items.headline_ai: BXSL reports Q1 2026 NII covers $0.77 dividend, declares Q2 distribution
items.snippet: Blackstone Secured Lending reported Q1 2026 NII per share fully covering its $0.77 dividend on NAV of $26.26, and declared a second quarter 2026 dividend of $0.77 per share.

items.headline_ai: BXSL reports Q4 2025 NII of $0.80, approves $250M share buyback program
items.snippet: Blackstone Secured Lending reported Q4 2025 NII of $0.80 per share covering its dividend, approved a $250 million share repurchase plan, and declared a Q1 2026 dividend of $0.77.

items.headline_ai: BXSL reports Q3 2025 record NII of $0.82, declares $0.77 Q4 dividend
items.snippet: Blackstone Secured Lending reported Q3 2025 NII of $0.82 per share — a record on a dollar basis — exceeding its $0.77 quarterly dividend, and declared a Q4 2025 dividend of $0.77.

items.snippet: Blackstone promoted Brad Marshall to Global Head of Private Credit Strategies and named Jonathan Bock as co-CEO of BXSL and BCRED alongside Marshall.

items.headline_ai: BXSL raises quarterly dividend 13% to $0.60 per share on rising earnings
items.snippet: Blackstone Credit raised BXSL's quarterly distribution to $0.60 per share, a 13% increase, driven by strong earnings and the positive impact of rising interest rates.

items.headline_ai: BXSL reports Q2 2022 10% dividend yield on NAV, no loans on non-accrual
items.snippet: Blackstone Secured Lending reported Q2 2022 results showcasing a 10% dividend yield over the prior twelve months on NAV and zero non-accrual loans, declaring a $0.53 Q3 dividend.

items.headline_ai: BXSL appoints Abby Miller as Chief Accounting Officer and Treasurer
items.snippet: Blackstone Credit appointed Abby Miller, formerly CFO of BlackRock Capital Investment Corporation, as Chief Accounting Officer and Treasurer of BXSL and BCRED.

items.headline_ai: BXSL reports Q1 2022 strong results, declares $0.53 Q2 dividend
items.snippet: Blackstone Secured Lending reported Q1 2022 strong results with all loans performing and declared a second quarter 2022 dividend of $0.53 per share.

items.headline_ai: BXSL appoints Michelle Greene to Board of Trustees
items.snippet: Blackstone Secured Lending appointed Michelle Greene, an ESG and strategic sustainability leader and President Emeritus of the Long-Term Stock Exchange, to its Board of Trustees.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: BXSL reports Q4 2021 strong finish, 12.6% NAV total return for full year
items.snippet: Blackstone Secured Lending reported Q4 2021 strong results with a 12.6% NAV-based total return for the full year and declared a first quarter 2022 dividend of $0.53 per share.

items.headline_ai: Blackstone Secured Lending posts Q3 2021 NII of $0.63, near top of guidance
items.snippet: Blackstone Secured Lending reported Q3 2021 NII of $0.63 per share, at the high end of its $0.61-$0.63 estimated range, in its first quarter as a public company following its IPO.

items.snippet: Blackstone Secured Lending appointed Vik Sawhney, Blackstone's Chief Administrative Officer and Global Head of Institutional Client Solutions, to its Board of Trustees.

items.headline_ai: Blackstone promotes Carlos Whitaker as President, Kate Rubenstein as COO of BDCs
items.snippet: Blackstone Credit announced three new senior leaders for BXSL and BCRED: Carlos Whitaker as President, Kate Rubenstein as COO, and Chris Sullivan as Head of Sponsor Coverage.
